title: acer ginnala subsp. semenovii
intro: Acer ginnala subsp. semenovii, also known as Korean mountain maple, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been found to be effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Acer ginnala subsp. semenovii include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. The plant can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
